creator: thomas.e.zander@googlemail.com
text:
Yes, these things happen. mplayer is no exception here, this is what
we have UPDATING and portmaster -r for.
Please have a look at my reply to
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/170035

Manually maintaining all potential chains of transitive dependencies
is going to kill us. Sometimes when a shared lib is bumped, people
just will have to do a portmaster -r.
